name: GFG Resources Inc.
description: GFG Resources Inc. is a North American precious metals exploration company focused on acquiring, exploring, and developing highly prospective gold properties in tier-one jurisdictions. The company's key assets include the Pen Gold Project and the Dore Gold Project, both located in the prolific Abitibi Greenstone Belt in Ontario, Canada, as well as the Rattlesnake Hills Gold Project in Wyoming, United States. GFG Resources is committed to creating shareholder value through systematic, disciplined exploration and discovery.
